taglines: Focus on your cases, not spreadsheets.
hero_subheads: Eliminate cash flow gaps with ease.
No more manual tracking or confusion.
Stay organized with simple document management.
Focus on your clients, we handle the billing.
value_props: Centralized client information storage for law firms.
Easily track billing workflows without spreadsheets.
Manage documents efficiently for better cash flow.
Reduce billing errors with manual-first workflows.

feature_bullets: Reduce reliance on spreadsheets for billing.
